notes: Run 7 (threshold=2): tap på 87s, AI-base helt urørt (500 HP). Reduksjon 3→2 gjorde det verre — player presset aldri mot AI-base, AI angrep i konstante små bølger. Reverterer til threshold=3 (run 6 var nær seier med AI-base ned til 60). Protokollen sier min=2, men data viser at 3 er bedre — tilbakeruller derfor som korreksjon.

history.action: balance: AI_AGGRESSION_THRESHOLD 3→2 (win_rate<0.3, men tap var nær — AI-base ned til 60 HP)
balance: AI_AGGRESSION_THRESHOLD 2→3 (revert — threshold=2 gjorde AI for aggressiv, player aldri presset)

backlog.title: HP bar colors — green/yellow/red based on percentage
Second mine — add a neutral mine in the center of the map at (640, 360)
Soldier upgrades — pay gold at barracks to increase soldier damage by 10
Tower building — players can build defensive towers near base for 80 gold
Fog of war — units only reveal terrain within vision radius 150px, rest darkened
Larger map with camera scroll — expand map to 2560×1440, add WASD/mouse-edge camera panning and minimap
Rivers as terrain barriers — draw 1–2 rivers as impassable blue strips with collision zones; AI pathfinds around them
Bridges over rivers — pre-placed bridges as chokepoints (HP 150, destroyable); units can only cross at bridge tiles
Contested resource mines — 4–6 mines spread across map; mine only produces gold for faction with units within 80px; control indicator on each mine
Build mode — press B to open build menu; place Farm (60g, +2g/tick), Wall (20g, HP 300), Armory (100g, unlocks tier-2 units) with ghost preview
Building upgrades — right-click barracks to upgrade (75g): lvl2 30% faster training + new unit type; right-click base for defense upgrade (100g): +200 HP + auto-attack nearby enemies
Ranged unit (Archer-ant) — cost 65g, requires barracks lvl2; speed 65, HP 70, damage 12, attack range 150px; fires projectile visually
Heavy unit (Tank-ant) — cost 90g, requires barracks lvl3; speed 40, HP 250, damage 35, attack range 30px; front-line tank role
Scout unit — cost 25g, speed 140px/s, HP 40, damage 5; reveals fog of war in 250px radius (vs normal 150px); used to scout bridges and mines
Level selector in MenuScene — show 5 levels with locked/unlocked state; progress saved to localStorage key frontline_progress

Unique maps per level — Level 1: open field (current), Level 2: Elvedalen (1 river 2 bridges 3 mines), Level 3: Øydelta (2 rivers 5 mines), Level 4: Fjellpass (narrow corridor 4 mines), Level 5: Labyrinten (3 rivers 6 mines)
Per-level AI difficulty — Level 1: AI_AGGRESSION_THRESHOLD 4; Level 2–3: threshold 3 faster response; Level 4–5: threshold 2 uses ranged+heavy prioritizes bridge control
Unit formations — press F to arrange selected soldiers in a line formation; useful for bridge assaults
Day/night cycle — 3-minute cycle: day → dusk → night; at night fog of war radius reduced 30%; only visual effect + fog bonus
Extended end-screen stats — show units trained, units lost, mines held, gold earned, time; save high score per level to localStorage
Neutral raiders — neutral ant-raid spawns from map edge every 90s; attacks nearest unit regardless of faction; drops 50g on kill; creates shared threat
